## v1.4.2

This release adds Emby server support, completes the Panda CSS styling migration, redesigns the application shell with a collapsible sidebar, virtualizes large library grids for smooth browsing, and publishes JellyPilot to the Arch User Repository.

### Highlights
- Added Emby media server support: login, library browsing, playback, and progress reporting through a provider-neutral session facade.
- Completed the full Panda CSS styling cutover across all application surfaces, replacing vanilla-extract and utility bridges.
- Replaced floating controls with a persistent, collapsible sidebar with compositor-animated FLIP transitions.
- Virtualized large browse grids with prefetched paging and persisted filter state.
- Redesigned item detail pages for desktop with back navigation and scroll restore.
- Cached artwork on disk scoped to the active service connection.
- Published to the AUR as [`jellypilot`](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/jellypilot) — install with any AUR helper or `makepkg -si`.

### Fixes
- Cleared closed MPV IPC connections to prevent stale socket references.
- Decoupled artwork loading from data fetches to avoid layout churn.
- Stabilized browse card layout and corrected virtual grid row height estimates.
- Redirected stale browse routes on server change and avoided reload churn.
- Kept tall service dialog content reachable and fixed Settings modal nesting.

### Maintenance
- Migrated data flows to solid-query with structured Effect Exit boundaries.
- Upgraded to TypeScript 7 and added rsdoctor build diagnostics.
- Added isolated native WebDriver E2E harness and Tauri parity evidence workflow.
- Consolidated agent documentation and Effect rules into docs/agents/.
Generated by local code agent from v1.4.1..v1.4.2.
